title: Peculiar Morning
content:
As if every living thing lived, breathed
    its existence
    explained why water took the shape
    of a container,
    studied sharpened awareness of cold,
    broke night spots onto a peculiar morning.
meaning:
This evocative piece by Paul Cameron Brown, titled "Peculiar Morning", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
